arabic: حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، حَدَّثَنَا غُنْدَرٌ، حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، سَمِعْتُ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، رَخَّصَ أَوْ رُخِّصَ لِحِكَّةٍ بِهِمَا‏.‏

english.text:
(Wearing of silk) was allowed to them (i.e. `AbdurRahman and Az-Zubair) because of the itching they 
suffered from.

chapter.english: Fighting for the Cause of Allah (Jihaad)
